news.headline: "Momcozy launches "Never Miss the Champion Moment" campaign for Paris 2024 Olympics, offers for 4 million moms worldwide."
news.summary: In Denver, Momcozy, a popular maternity and baby brand with a global following of over 4 million moms, is excited to introduce its "Never Miss the Champion Moment" campaign in anticipation of the Paris 2024 Olympics. This campaign aims to support mothers in balancing the thrill of the Olympics with the responsibilities of parenting. Through exclusive offers, Momcozy is providing solutions for feeding, parenting, and outings to help moms make the most of this special time.

news.headline: Fabrício Oliveira elected as Lions Clubs International President for FY 2024-2025. Brazilian businessman from Catolé do Rocha, Paraiba.
news.summary: In Oak Brook, Illinois, on July 1, 2024, Fabrício Oliveira, a prominent entrepreneur from Catolé do Rocha, Paraiba, Brazil, has been chosen as the upcoming International President of Lions Clubs International. Oliveira secured this prestigious role through an election.

news.headline: BitMEX switches BLAST/USDT futures mark to Fair Price, boosting market accuracy.
news.summary: In a recent development, BitMEX has revised its marking method for the BLAST/USDT futures contract to Fair Price marking. This update is aimed at improving market accuracy and overall trading efficiency. The Fair Price marking framework is expected to provide more precise pricing for the contract, ensuring a fairer trading environment for users. With this change, BitMEX users can expect a more transparent and reliable trading experience on the platform. Stay updated for further details on this enhancement.

news.headline: Bronco Wine Co. partners with Republic National Distributing Company for strategic distribution, celebrating 50th anniversary.
news.summary: In Ceres, California on July 1, 2024, Bronco Wine Co., a family-owned business marking its 50th Anniversary, finalized a broader strategic distribution partnership with Republic National Distributing Company (RNDC). RNDC, a prominent wholesaler of alcoholic beverages in the country, will now distribute Bronco Wine Co.'s products across an expanded network.

news.headline: Teva's stocks drop due to FTC investigation on patents.
Anglo American shuts down Grosvenor Mine in Australia after underground gas ignition incident. No injuries reported, operations halted for several months.
news.summary: Anglo American (OTC: AAUKF) has announced the suspension of operations at its Grosvenor steelmaking coal mine in Queensland, Australia, following an underground coal gas ignition incident on June 29. The company confirmed that all emergency protocols were executed, resulting in the safe evacuation of the workforce without any injuries. Due to the projected underground damage, the suspension is expected to last for several months as reported by the company. Anglo American's steelmaking coal mine in Queensland is facing a halt in operations after the recent incident.

news.headline: Inventor from Austin creates SOUL LOCS, a new hair restraining device for dreadlocks and braids.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 1, 2024, an inventor from Austin introduced a new product called SOUL LOCS. The inventor aimed to offer a practical and stylish solution for keeping hair, dreadlocks, braids, and other hairstyles secure. The innovative design is intended to be both functional and visually appealing. The product's launch is expected to revolutionize the hair accessory market.

news.headline: Terran Orbital wins "Best Business of the Year" by Greater Irvine Chamber. Leader in satellite solutions, NYSE: LLAP.
news.summary: Terran Orbital Corporation, a prominent player in satellite-based solutions for aerospace and defense industries, recently won the prestigious "Best Business of the Year" award from the 2024 Greater Irvine Chamber. The company, listed on the NYSE under LLAP, expressed gratitude for the recognition, attributing it to the hard work and innovation of its team. This achievement underscores Terran Orbital's commitment to excellence and resilience in the industry.

news.headline: Mobicard™ completes Form C filing with SEC, launches Reg CF Crowdfunding Campaign.
news.summary: Peer To Peer Network, Inc., also known as Mobicard Inc., has successfully filed Form C with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). This marks the launch of their Regulation Crowdfunding (Reg CF) campaign, aimed at raising funds from the public. The initiative is expected to attract investors looking to support the company's growth and innovation. The Form C filing is a crucial step for Mobicard Inc. to comply with SEC regulations and provide potential investors with essential information. The crowdfunding campaign presents an opportunity for individuals to participate in supporting the company's vision.

news.headline: eLong Power Holding received $11M order for energy storage. Merger with TMT Acquisition Corp to close in 2nd half 2024, delivery by end of 2024.
news.summary: The merger is projected to be finalized in the latter part of 2024, while the delivery of the energy storage system is set to be finished by the conclusion of the same year.

news.headline: Fed learns from Canada Day: interest rate insights.
Vantiva to repay and mature its short-term loan, amounting to $5 million.
Update on share capital and voting rights as of June 2024: details coming soon. Stay tuned!
SYENSQO bought 100,000 of its own shares.
Nexans liquidity contract update for H1 2024 released covering Jan 1st to Jun 30th.
Ampere leads Renault Group in battery strategy with LFP tech & cell-to-pack solutions, revolutionizing design.
news.summary: Renault Group is implementing a revolutionary battery strategy spearheaded by Ampere. This strategy involves utilizing LFP technology and developing cell-to-pack solutions. These advancements are set to enhance the performance and lifespan of Renault's batteries, ultimately benefiting the group's electric vehicle lineup. This move underscores Renault's commitment to staying at the forefront of innovation in the electric vehicle market.

news.headline: Coface SA reports total number of voting rights and shares in capital as of June 30, 2024.
news.summary: COFACE SA has reported the total number of voting rights and shares in its capital as of June 30, 2024. The company disclosed that there are [insert number] voting rights and [insert number] shares in its capital.

news.headline: Bouygues reports monthly total shares and voting rights numbers without specifying the source.
ASM to repurchase 200,000 shares from June 24-28, 2024.
COFACE SA reports its mid-year liquidity agreement with ODDO BHF.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. The number of employed individuals has also increased by 350,000, bringing the total number of employed individuals to 10.5 million. This improvement in the job market has been attributed to various government initiatives aimed at boosting economic growth and creating more job opportunities. Additionally, the report highlights a growth in the GDP by 3.5% in the last quarter, signaling a positive trend in the overall economy. Experts have expressed optimism about the future outlook of the job market and the economy as a whole.

news.headline: Israeli PM: Israel close to eliminating Hamas' military strength.
Supreme Court upholds Trump immunity, delaying trial.
Perficient recognized as Major Player in IDC MarketScape for Worldwide Cloud Professional Services.
news.summary: Perficient, a company based in St. Louis, has recently been recognized as a Major Player in the IDC MarketScape: Worldwide Cloud Professional Services 2024 Vendor Assessment, highlighting its prominent position in the industry. This acknowledgement underscores Perficient's expertise and capabilities in cloud services, solidifying its role in the global market.

news.headline: Global True Wireless Headphones Market projected to reach USD 20.62 Billion by 2029, with USD 12.92 Billion value in 2023. Emerging markets offer growth opportunities for Xiaomi, boAt, and Skullcandy.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on the global true wireless headphones market has been released, forecasting significant growth. The market was valued at USD 12.92 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach USD 20.62 billion by 2029, reflecting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8%. The increasing acceptance of innovative products in countries such as China, Brazil, and India is creating appealing prospects for businesses operating in the true wireless headphones industry.

news.headline: Blue Compass RV wins Gold Globee award for fast nationwide brand rollout in one year. 9th Annual 2024 Globee Awards.
news.summary: Blue Compass RV has been awarded the Gold Globee for Achievement in Brand Development for successfully completing their nationwide brand rollout within a year. The award was received in Fort Lauderdale, Florida on July 1, 2024. This recognition highlights the company's exceptional efforts to establish its brand across the country in a remarkably short time frame.

news.headline: Elis completes purchase of Wonway in Malaysia, expanding its operations in the region.
Total voting rights on June 30, 2024 will be disclosed.
Unleash MemeFi's tap combo to earn millions of free coins for battling meme monsters in the Telegram game.
news.summary: Defeating meme creatures becomes simpler with the availability of millions of complimentary coins for enhancements. Learn how to utilize MemeFi's undisclosed tap combination for an advantage.

news.headline: 3D printers used by ESA to create Lego bricks from meteorite dust to test for Moon base viability.
news.summary: 3D printers were utilized by the European Space Agency (ESA) to create Lego bricks using meteorite dust for testing on potential Moon bases. This innovative process involved using meteorite material to produce the bricks, highlighting the ESA's forward-thinking approach. The use of 3D printers showcases advancements in technology within the space industry. This initiative demonstrates how the ESA is exploring new avenues for constructing Moon bases, with a focus on sustainability and resource efficiency. The project underscores the agency's commitment to pushing boundaries and seeking unconventional solutions for space exploration.

news.headline: NewPoint grants $22.3M Freddie Mac financing for Maryland multifamily communities owned by NOVO Properties.
news.summary: In Washington, NewPoint has facilitated the acquisition of Freddie Mac Workforce Housing Preservation financing by NOVO Properties to refinance several multifamily communities in Maryland.

news.headline: Sogeclair's H1 2024 report on liquidity contract with Société de Bourse Gilbert Dupont, released.
Circle is the first global stablecoin issuer to comply with EU's MiCA law by obtaining an EMI license.
news.summary: Circle, a prominent financial technology company, has made history by becoming the inaugural global stablecoin issuer to attain compliance with the European Union's MiCA regulatory framework. The company secured an Electronic Money Institution license, known as 'agrément en qualité d'établissement de monnaie électronique,' from the Autorité de Contrôle Prudentiel et de Résolution (ACPR). This accomplishment solidifies Circle's position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: FIU named Preeminent State Research University, youngest institution in elite group per Florida Board of Governors.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Miami, FIU was named a Preeminent State Research University by the Florida Board of Governors. This recognition is a testament to FIU's academic excellence and research achievements. At a young age, FIU has become the newest member of this prestigious group of universities. The designation, established in 2013 under Florida law, highlights FIU's commitment to advancing in the field of research and education.

news.headline: Cushing Terrell acquires Eclipse Engineering, enhancing structural engineering services for clients.
news.summary: The merger between Cushing Terrell and Eclipse Engineering enhances the services provided by the firms, offering clients more comprehensive structural engineering solutions. This collaboration took place in Billings, Montana on July 1, 2024. The joining of these two companies brings together a wider range of expertise and resources, strengthening their ability to meet the needs of various projects. This partnership signifies a significant development in the industry and paves the way for a more robust structural engineering landscape.

news.headline: Sherrie Westin named CEO of Sesame Workshop, first woman in the role since co-founder Joan Ganz Cooney.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on July 1, 2024, Sherrie Westin was appointed as the Chief Executive Officer of Sesame Workshop by the organization's Board of Trustees in New York. This decision marks a historic moment as Westin becomes the first woman to hold this position since Joan Ganz Cooney, one of the organization's co-founders. With this appointment, Westin will now spearhead the operations of the global impact nonprofit responsible for the iconic children's show Sesame Street. Prior to this role, Westin held the position of...

news.headline: US Treasury Department holds 3-month bill auction, raising $30 billion.
US auction of 6-month bills.
US 6-month bill high yield comes in at 5.115%, lower than the previous forecast of 5.140%.
US 3-month bill bid-to-cover drops to 2.76, missing forecast of 2.85.
US 6-month bill sees bid-to-cover at 2.99, below the previous 3.160 and forecasted figures.
US 3-month bill high yield at 5.24% (Previous 5.235%) and forecast unchanged.
Paul Seymour and Nicole Parker bring $113 million in assets under advisory to Cetera Advisor Networks from Cadaret, Grant & Co.
news.summary: Paul Seymour and Nicole Parker, operating under the name Financial Services, have recently transitioned from Cadaret, Grant & Co., Inc. to join Cetera Financial Group in San Diego on July 1, 2024. Cetera Financial Group, known as a top financial advisor Wealth Hub, reported the addition of Seymour and Parker to their team. This move signifies a notable change in the financial services sector, reflecting the growing influence and appeal of Cetera.

news.headline: Collagen Casings Market projected to reach $2.31 billion by 2031 per Meticulous Research® report.
news.summary: In Redding, California on July 1, 2024, a recent market research report was released regarding the Collagen Casings Market. The report covers information on market size, share, forecasts, and trends analysis based on different factors such as type (Edible, Non-Edible), caliber (Small, Large), application (Fresh Sausages, Processed Sausages), and end user (Food Service). This report provides valuable insights for businesses in the industry to make informed decisions.

news.headline: Inventor from Texas creates T SPARE inflatable support for tires to aid motorists during flat tires.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 1, 2024, an inventor from Austin, Texas shared his motivation behind creating the T SPARE as a safe solution for motorists dealing with flat tires. This innovative design offers a way for drivers to keep moving without the hassle of changing a tire or waiting for emergency assistance. The inventor's creation aims to address this common issue and provide a practical alternative. The T SPARE is set to revolutionize how drivers handle flat tires on the road.

news.headline: Shipley Do-Nuts introduces limited-time Egg & Cheese kolaches in the breakfast wars, available until Sept. 30.
news.summary: Houston's Shipley Do-Nuts, well-known for its classic pastries, is now introducing a special addition to its menu for a limited time. The new Egg & Cheese kolaches have joined the breakfast lineup, in response to the competitive landscape dubbed "the breakfast wars." This Texas-born brand has set the availability of these kolaches from July 1 to September 30, marking a temporary but enticing offer for customers. Enjoy these savory treats at any Shipley location for a limited period, adding some variety to your breakfast routine.

news.headline: WIN Technology acquires Digicorp Inc., expanding IT services; July 1, 2024; EAU CLAIRE, Wisconsin.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Eau Claire, Wisconsin, WIN Technology finalized its acquisition of Digicorp, Inc., marking a significant expansion of its leading IT Services operation. This strategic move aims to enhance the delivery of innovative digital solutions by leveraging the combined expertise of both companies. This acquisition highlights WIN Technology's commitment to growth and competitiveness in the market.

news.headline: Sold-out 68th Summer Fancy Food Show in New York City drew over 29,000 industry pros for June 23-25 event.
news.summary: In New York on July 1, 2024, over 29,000 individuals from the specialty food and beverage sector convened at the 68th Summer Fancy Food Show organized by the Specialty Food Association (SFA). The event, held from June 23 to 25 at the Jacob Javits Center in New York City, was completely sold out. These shows serve as a gathering place for professionals within the industry to network, showcase products, and engage in discussions surrounding the latest trends and innovations in the sector.

news.headline: Pinwheel and Narmi team up for frictionless direct deposit switching for financial institutions using Narmi, introducing Pinwheel Prime.
news.summary: Fintechs and financial institutions utilizing Narmi's platform have the opportunity to streamline the integration of seamless direct deposit switching into their account opening process through Pinwheel Prime. This new feature, launched in New York on July 1, 2024, aims to enhance the efficiency and user experience for customers. Pinwheel, a leading fintech company, is empowering financial institutions to prioritize customer satisfaction and improve their services.

news.headline: 40 high schools receive $5,000 grants to develop culinary programs with curriculum, supplies, and equipment.
news.summary: The Rachael Ray Foundation and the National... have announced that ProStart educators in 40 high schools nationwide will be awarded grants totaling $200,000. Each educator will receive a $5,000 grant to bolster their classroom experience through the acquisition of curriculum materials, supplies, and equipment. The grants aim to enhance the educational environment for both teachers and students, fostering greater learning opportunities and innovation in culinary education. The grants signify a significant investment in advancing the quality of education in high school culinary programs across the country.

news.headline: Vaisala Corporation announces share repurchase on 1.7.2024 to enhance climate action, with over 2,300 experts globally.
news.summary: Vaisala, a renowned company in measurement instruments and climate intelligence, plays a crucial role in promoting climate action worldwide. For nearly 90 years, they have been at the forefront of innovation with a dedicated team of over 2,300 experts. Their goal is to provide customers with the tools and data needed to enhance resource efficiency, facilitate energy transition, and prioritize the safety and well-being of global communities. Vaisala's series A shares are publicly listed on the Nasdaq Helsinki stock exchange, underlining their commitment to making a positive impact on the planet. Visit vaisala.com for more information.
